---------------------
Developed and manufactured in Sweden – ESC and drone motors for UAS
All ESCs has FOC, Field Oriented Control.

products.name: Simplex Motion Speed Mode Motors
products.descriptor: Speed-controlled BLDC motor family with closed-loop feedback down to low speeds

evidence.snippet:
### Simplex Motion Speed Motors
Introducing the new Simplex Motion Speed Mode Motors. Do you need feedback and controlled speed even at low speeds? Simplex Motion Speed Mode Motors will do the job. https://simplexmotion.com/products/simplex-motion-speedmotors/

products.name: Motor Drive Units
products.descriptor: Customized integrated assemblies combining servomotors, gearboxes, and/or brakes

evidence.snippet:
Drive Units
-----------
Motor Drive Units and Wheel Drive Units – Servomotors, gearboxes and/or brakes.
Customized to application needs.

unresolved_questions: SimplexMotion100A (first product, 2012) appears to have been folded into the SM-Serie (SM100A). The corpus does not confirm whether it remains a separately sold SKU or was superseded — additional product page fetches would clarify.
Drone motor product names are not visible in any fetched page (drone-motors category page showed 'coming soon'); fetch_requests submitted for that URL.
Gearbox product names are entirely absent from the corpus; gearboxes appear in the nav and in drive-unit descriptions but no model names were found.
TD100 ESC product detail page (resource-0017) rendered as 'coming soon' store placeholder — specs are only inferred from the URL slug (FOC, 6-12S, 24-48V, 20-100A).

fetch_requests.reason: Product category page for drone motors; skipped during crawl — needed to identify named drone motor SKUs and specs.

News/product announcement page for Speed Mode Motors; skipped — would confirm product specs and availability.
Gearbox product category page; skipped — needed to identify named gearbox products sold by Simplex Motion.
Motor Drive Units product page; skipped — needed to clarify whether drive units are catalog products or pure engineering services.
